name: SpecialHours
description: Describes the configuration of special store hours.

date.description: Date the special hour configuration applies.

timeRanges.description: Hours range applied to configured date. For open days, the timeRanges field is required. For closed days, the timeRanges field is ignored.

type.description: Store state that should be applied during the configured special hour. If this field is set to CLOSED, the timeRanges field is ignored.
